ocr_findings.description: Ruby furigana annotations (ジャン over JANコード, イスター over イラスター) present in image but not in OCR output — cosmetic only, main terms are captured.
Sidebar label '学習のポイント' visible in image top-right of the 発想の転換 box is absent from OCR — minor decorative label.

reviewer_notes: Lesson 02-06 標準化 intro page. All body text, section headings, and inline emphasis captured accurately. Image placeholders correctly noted for barcode scanner and mascot illustrations. No high- or med-severity issues.
